fact_nuggets.text: Victory Star (Japanese: Victory Star) is an Ability introduced in Generation V. It is the signature Ability of Victini.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD GtI Raises the accuracy of moves used by the Pokemon and allies standing next to it. * The accuracy of moves goes up! It also affects allies who are next to the Pokemon. * S MD The accuracy of moves goes up! It also has effects on teammates who are next to the Pokemon.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Victory Star increases the accuracy of moves (that are not one-hit knockout moves ) used by the Pokemon with this Ability and its allies in battle by approximately 10% (or precisely, a factor of 4506/4096) of their original accuracy. Victory Star can stack and does so multiplicatively (which means if there are two ally Pokemon with this Ability, the accuracy increase is 21%). Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Victory Star has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] Victory Star increases the accuracy of moves (that are not one-hit knockout moves ) used by the Pokemon with this Ability and its allies in battle by approximately 10% (or precisely, a factor of 4506/4096) of their original accuracy. Victory Star can stack and does so multiplicatively (which means if there are two ally Pokemon with this Ability, the accuracy increase is 21%).
Increases moves' accuracy to 1.1 for friendly Pokemon.
